# Plan-local state file

Plan-local runtime state artifact at `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/state.json`.

- Schema JSON: [local-state.schema.json](../../../../schema/artifacts/local-state.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.LocalStateFile`

## Root Shape

LocalStateFile is the plan-local runtime state cache under `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/state.json`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `active_review_round` | `ReviewRoundState` | no | ActiveReviewRound records the current active review round when review is in flight. |
| `current_node` | `string` | no | CurrentNode is the cached canonical workflow node when one has been resolved. |
| `execution_started_at` | `string` | no | ExecutionStartedAt is the execution-start timestamp for the plan. |
| `land` | `LandState` | no | Land records the current land state when merge cleanup is in flight. |
| `latest_ci` | `LegacyCIState` | no | LatestCI is the transitional cached CI state retained while status still reads legacy evidence hints directly from state.json. |
| `latest_evidence` | `EvidenceSetState` | no | LatestEvidence records the latest evidence pointers tracked in the state file. |
| `latest_publish` | `LegacyPublishState` | no | LatestPublish is the transitional cached publish state retained while status still reads legacy hints directly from state.json. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | no | PlanPath is the current tracked or archived plan path associated with this state file. |
| `plan_stem` | `string` | no | PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with this state file. |
| `reopen` | `ReopenState` | no | Reopen records the active reopen repair state when one exists. |
| `revision` | `integer` | no | Revision is the current plan-local revision number. |
| `sync` | `LegacySyncState` | no | Sync is the transitional cached sync state retained while status still reads legacy hints directly from state.json. |

## Definitions

## EvidencePointerState

EvidencePointerState points to one evidence record from the local state file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the evidence kind. |
| `path` | `string` | yes | Path is the path to the evidence record artifact. |
| `record_id` | `string` | yes | RecordID is the stable identifier of the evidence record. |
| `recorded_at` | `string` | no | RecordedAt is the evidence record timestamp when one is tracked. |

## EvidenceSetState

EvidenceSetState records the latest evidence pointers tracked in the local state file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ci` | `EvidencePointerState` | no | CI points to the latest CI evidence record when one exists. |
| `publish` | `EvidencePointerState` | no | Publish points to the latest publish evidence record when one exists. |
| `sync` | `EvidencePointerState` | no | Sync points to the latest sync evidence record when one exists. |

## LandState

LandState records the current land state in the local state file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `commit` | `string` | no | Commit is the merge commit or landed commit recorded for the land phase. |
| `completed_at` | `string` | no | CompletedAt is the timestamp when land cleanup completed. |
| `landed_at` | `string` | no | LandedAt is the timestamp when the land command recorded merge completion. |
| `pr_url` | `string` | no | PRURL is the pull request URL recorded for the land phase. |

## LegacyCIState

LegacyCIState is the transitional CI cache retained in the local state file while status still reads legacy evidence hints directly.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `snapshot_id` | `string` | yes | SnapshotID is the legacy CI snapshot identifier. |
| `status` | `string` | yes | Status is the cached legacy CI status. |

## LegacyPublishState

LegacyPublishState is the transitional publish cache retained in the local state file while status still reads legacy hints directly.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `attempt_id` | `string` | yes | AttemptID is the legacy publish attempt identifier. |
| `pr_url` | `string` | yes | PRURL is the cached publish pull request URL. |

## LegacySyncState

LegacySyncState is the transitional sync cache retained in the local state file while status still reads legacy hints directly.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `conflicts` | `boolean` | yes | Conflicts reports whether the cached sync state observed conflicts. |
| `freshness` | `string` | yes | Freshness is the cached sync freshness label. |

## LocalStateFile

LocalStateFile is the plan-local runtime state cache under `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/state.json`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `active_review_round` | `ReviewRoundState` | no | ActiveReviewRound records the current active review round when review is in flight. |
| `current_node` | `string` | no | CurrentNode is the cached canonical workflow node when one has been resolved. |
| `execution_started_at` | `string` | no | ExecutionStartedAt is the execution-start timestamp for the plan. |
| `land` | `LandState` | no | Land records the current land state when merge cleanup is in flight. |
| `latest_ci` | `LegacyCIState` | no | LatestCI is the transitional cached CI state retained while status still reads legacy evidence hints directly from state.json. |
| `latest_evidence` | `EvidenceSetState` | no | LatestEvidence records the latest evidence pointers tracked in the state file. |
| `latest_publish` | `LegacyPublishState` | no | LatestPublish is the transitional cached publish state retained while status still reads legacy hints directly from state.json. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | no | PlanPath is the current tracked or archived plan path associated with this state file. |
| `plan_stem` | `string` | no | PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with this state file. |
| `reopen` | `ReopenState` | no | Reopen records the active reopen repair state when one exists. |
| `revision` | `integer` | no | Revision is the current plan-local revision number. |
| `sync` | `LegacySyncState` | no | Sync is the transitional cached sync state retained while status still reads legacy hints directly from state.json. |

## ReopenState

ReopenState records the active reopen repair state.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `base_step_count` | `integer` | no | BaseStepCount is the number of plan steps that existed before the reopen. |
| `mode` | `string` | yes | Mode is the active reopen mode. |
| `reopened_at` | `string` | no | ReopenedAt is the reopen timestamp. |

## ReviewRoundState

ReviewRoundState records the current active review round in the local state file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `aggregated` | `boolean` | yes | Aggregated reports whether the round has already been aggregated. |
| `decision` | `string` | no | Decision is the aggregate review decision when one is known. |
| `kind` | `string` | yes | Kind is the review kind for the round. |
| `revision` | `integer` | no | Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the round. |
| `round_id` | `string` | yes | RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round. |
| `step` | `integer` | no | Step is the tracked plan step number when the round is step-scoped. |
